verdicts.note: Box frames shower glass partition and ceiling, not the bathtub.
Full-frame box captures shower hose and tiles, not a mirrored cabinet.
Narrow edge strip of wall/door frame with reflection, not the cabinet.
Thin vertical sliver of shower glass hardware, not a mirrored cabinet.
Box covers the open mirrored cabinet interior and shelves.
Box tightly frames the illuminated cabinet shelving unit.
Cabinet interior is correct but left edge bleeds into the sink area.
Box spans sink and bathtub corner instead of the sink alone.
Thin horizontal strip of tub rim and glass, not a sink.
Box centers on faucet handle and marble tile, missing the basin.
Tight box on the ceiling-mounted circular smoke alarm.
Box cleanly frames the three-panel mirrored medicine cabinet.
Sink is partially boxed but left side includes a large bathtub section.
Tight box on the rectangular sink basin and rim.
Box localizes a circular cabinet mirror/light, not a sink.
Box covers the full bathtub including glass screen and tiled front.
Bathtub is correct but lower third of box is checkered floor.
Box captures the bathtub basin and rim with acceptable tightness.
Horizontal slice of hose, wall, and tub rim misses the bathtub body.
Tiny box on one ceiling fixture does not localize the ceiling item.
Mirror door is correct but box is loose with excess surrounding wall.
Box aligns with a single mirror pane of the cabinet unit.
Box frames a chrome wall hook/handle, not recessed spotlights.
Box frames a circular exhaust vent, not recessed spotlights.
Box correctly localizes the toilet bowl and lid.
Tight box around the full toilet with lid raised.
Box spans the bathtub length from shower screen to far rim.
Tight box on the closed toilet lid and upper bowl.
Tight box around the wall-hung toilet with seat and lid up.
